hindi: न मन्त्रं नो यन्त्रं तदपि च न जाने स्तुतिमहो,
english: I know no mantra, no yantra, and alas I know no praise
roman: Na mantram no yantram tadapi cha na jane stutim aho

hindi: न चाह्वानं ध्यानं तदपि च न जाने स्तुतिकथाः।
english: I know not how to invoke you, nor how to meditate, nor your stories of praise
roman: Na chahvanam dhyanam tadapi cha na jane stuti kathah

hindi: न जाने मुद्रास्ते तदपि च न जाने विलपनं,
english: I know no mudras, and I know not how to lament before you
roman: Na jane mudras te tadapi cha na jane vilapanam

english: But I know this, O Mother — following you removes all sorrow
roman: Param jane matas tvad anusaranam klesha haranam

english: Due to ignorance of rites, absence of wealth and laziness
Or due to inability to perform, or delusion born of pride in the mind

hindi: कृतं वा अकृतं वा किमपि मम दोषं परिहर,
english: Whatever error I have committed or left undone — forgive all my faults
roman: Kritam va akritam va kimapi mama dosham parihara

hindi: शिवेश्वरि त्वां मां शरणमिति याचे तव पदम्॥
english: O Shiveshwari, I seek refuge at your feet — I implore you
roman: Shiveshvari tvam mam sharananam iti yache tava padam

english: Thousands of offenses are committed by me day and night
Considering me your servant, O supreme Goddess, forgive me
roman: Daso ayam iti mam maatva kshamasva Parameshvari
